# SnusFriend

> Europe's largest online nicotine pouch store with 700+ tobacco-free products from 91+ brands.

## About

SnusFriend (snusfriends.com) is a European e-commerce store specialising in tobacco-free nicotine pouches. We offer the widest selection of nicotine pouches in Europe, with products from brands including ZYN, VELO, LOOP, ACE, Pablo, KILLA, Siberia, Kurwa, and many more.

All products are tobacco-free and smoke-free. Nicotine pouches are placed between the gum and upper lip for a discreet nicotine experience.

## Key Pages

- Homepage: https://snusfriends.com/
- All nicotine pouches: https://snusfriends.com/nicotine-pouches
- Full product catalog: https://snusfriends.com/products
- Brands directory: https://snusfriends.com/brands
- FAQ: https://snusfriends.com/faq
- About: https://snusfriends.com/about
- Shipping info: https://snusfriends.com/shipping
- Returns: https://snusfriends.com/returns
- Contact: https://snusfriends.com/contact

## Product Categories

### By Flavour
- Mint: https://snusfriends.com/products/flavor/mint
- Fruit: https://snusfriends.com/products/flavor/fruit
- Berry: https://snusfriends.com/products/flavor/berry
- Citrus: https://snusfriends.com/products/flavor/citrus
- Coffee: https://snusfriends.com/products/flavor/coffee
- Unflavoured: https://snusfriends.com/products/flavor/unflavored

### By Strength
- Light (2-4 mg): https://snusfriends.com/products/strength/light
- Normal (4-8 mg): https://snusfriends.com/products/strength/normal
- Strong (8-12 mg): https://snusfriends.com/products/strength/strong
- Extra Strong (12-16 mg): https://snusfriends.com/products/strength/extra-strong
- Super Strong (16+ mg): https://snusfriends.com/products/strength/super-strong

### Brands We Carry
Major brands include: ZYN, VELO, LOOP, ACE, Pablo, KILLA, Siberia, Kurwa, White Fox, Sting, Lyft, Skruf, Helwit, VOLT, Thor, Cuba, Shiro, Klint, and 70+ more.

## Pricing

Products are priced per can with multi-can discounts (3-pack, 5-pack, 10-pack, 30-pack). All prices in EUR.

## Loyalty Programme

SnusFriend operates **SnusPoints** — earn 10 points per EUR 1 spent. Points redeemable for discounts on future orders.

## Shipping

We ship to most EU countries. Standard delivery takes 2-5 business days. Orders dispatched within 24 hours. Free shipping on qualifying orders.

## Age Requirement

All customers must be 18 or older. Age verification is required at checkout in compliance with EU regulations.
